title: German Energy Company Slows Investments due to Lack of Green Hydrogen Demand
content: German energy company Uniper has postponed its target to invest eight billion euros in growth and the green transformation by 2030 due to a lack of demand for green hydrogen. Low energy prices and slower-than-expected regulatory reforms were other reasons for the decision. As per the CEO, there are hardly any major customers who buy green hydrogen.
author: Analysts Account
